framework.name: OAuth PAR as Agent Authorization Transport
framework.description: Uses RFC 9126 Pushed Authorization Requests as the submission mechanism — the agent pushes the proposal JWT to the AS before redirecting the user for consent. This reuses existing OAuth infrastructure rather than inventing new protocols.
framework.raw_quote: submits the resulting JWT to the Authorization Server (AS) via OAuth 2.0 Pushed Authorization Requests (PAR) [RFC9126]
